headline: Assessing Humana (HUM) Valuation After A Prolonged Share Price Slump
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Humana (HUM) Humana (HUM) has drawn attention after a stretch of weak longer term returns, including a negative past year and past 3 months, despite slight gains over the past week and month. At a last close of US$175.14 and a market value of about US$20.9b, the company sits against a backdrop of US$129.7b in revenue and US$1.2b in net income from its insurance and CenterWell operations. See our latest analysis for Humana. The recent 5.2% 7 day share price...

headline: Enovis, Neogen, Humana, LifeStance Health Group, and Hims & Hers Health Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after major indices including the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average fell sharply as investors reacted to escalating uncertainty tied to the U.S.-Iran conflict and policy deadlines set by the Trump administration.

headline: Can UnitedHealth's Avery Redefine Healthcare Navigation at Scale?
summary: UNH rolls out Avery, a generative AI assistant to simplify healthcare navigation, aiming to boost engagement, cut friction and scale across millions.
